title: Multi-Turn On-Policy Distillation with Prefix Replay
innovation_summary: Multi-Turn On-Policy Distillation with Prefix Replay: We study on-policy distillation (OPD) for agentic tasks, where an LLM agent interacts with an environment over multiple turns and a student imitates a teacher over.
